functional_requirements.title: Record Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher records a grade for a student in a course. Validates student existence, course existence, score range (0-100), and no duplicate grade for the same student-course pair.

functional_requirements.title: Update Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher updates an existing grade record. Validates grade record existence and updates score and recorded_at timestamp.

functional_requirements.title: Delete Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher deletes a grade record. Validates grade record existence and removes it.

functional_requirements.title: Get Student Grades
functional_requirements.description: Retrieve all grades for a student, compute average score, total credits, and GPA. Display grades with letter grades.

functional_requirements.title: Get Course Grades
functional_requirements.description: Retrieve all grades for a course, compute course average, max, min, and grade distribution (letter grades).

functional_requirements.title: List Grades by Class
functional_requirements.description: List grades for a class, optionally filtered by course. Compute class average and rank students by score.

functional_requirements.title: Get Grade Report
functional_requirements.description: Generate a text report for a student including all subject grades, average, GPA, and credit summary.

functional_requirements.title: Get Course Statistics
functional_requirements.description: Compute course statistics: average, standard deviation, pass rate, and grade distribution percentages.

functional_requirements.title: Add Student
functional_requirements.description: Add a new student to the system. Validates that student_id is unique.

functional_requirements.title: Add Course
functional_requirements.description: Add a new course to the system. Validates that course_id is unique.

non_functional_requirements.description: All operations are invoked via a single function manage_grade(command, grade_data) with consistent JSON input/output.
Data integrity: no duplicate grades for same student-course; validations on existence and score range.

acceptance_criteria.description: Record grade: valid input creates grade with correct grade_id and letter grade; duplicate returns error with existing grade_id.
Update grade: valid update changes score and letter grade; invalid grade_id returns error.
Delete grade: valid deletion removes record; invalid grade_id returns error.
Get student grades: returns correct grades, average, total credits, and GPA.
Get course grades: returns correct grades, average, max, min, and distribution.
List class grades: returns students with scores and ranks, class average correct.
Grade report: text report contains all required fields and formatting.
Course statistics: average, std_dev, pass_rate, grade_distribution computed correctly.
Add student: new student added; duplicate student_id returns error.
Add course: new course added; duplicate course_id returns error.

storage.details: Three independent in-memory data sources: students, courses, grades.

glossary.GPA: Grade Point Average, weighted by credits. A=4.0, B=3.0, C=2.0, D=1.0, F=0.
glossary.letter_grade: Grade letter based on score: A(90-100), B(80-89), C(70-79), D(60-69), F(<60).

global_state_sources.description: Stores student information keyed by student_id.
Stores course information keyed by course_id.
Stores grade records keyed by grade_id. grade_id auto-increments.

input_spec.description: Input is a JSON object with command and grade_data fields, passed to manage_grade function.

schema.command: string (one of: record_grade, update_grade, delete_grade, get_student_grades, get_course_grades, list_class_grades, get_grade_report, get_course_stats, add_student, add_course)
schema.grade_data: object containing relevant fields for the command

output_spec.description: Output is a JSON object with success, message, and data fields.
